title: Set up a Cloudflare Workers API with D1, KV, and R2
summary: Create a standalone Cloudflare Workers project with Wrangler CLI, wire up D1 (SQL), KV (key-value), and R2 (object storage) bindings, manage secrets, develop locally, and deploy globally.
declaration: I will set up a standalone Cloudflare Workers project using Wrangler CLI. This is for building edge API backends that run on Cloudflare's global network — not for deploying a Next.js frontend (that is Cloudflare Pages). If you want to deploy a Next.js site to Cloudflare Pages instead, say so before I begin.
